items.html: The matter is as written above: the Partzuf of the Nukva [female] begins to be built only behind the Chazeh [chest] of ZA [Zeir Anpin], at the end of the upper third of the Tifferet of ZA, because there the clothing of the Yesod of Ima within ZA comes to its end; and from there downward the lights are revealed in complete disclosure, as they come out of the opening of the Yesod of Ima into ZA. Then there is only a single Masach [screen] — the back of ZA — and those lights have the power to pierce it and pass outside. Not so above, where there are two partitions: one of Ima herself and one of ZA. Thus it follows that the place where the head of the Keter of the Nukva begins is at the very end of the first third of the Tifferet of Zeir Anpin, and from there to the end of the legs of Zeir Anpin the stature of the Partzuf of the Nukva extends, in ten Sefirot.
